steps.title: Test the first inequality
steps.content:
For inequality I, use $x=3$ and $y=-3$.
$$-3\lt -3(3)+8$$
$$-3\lt -1$$
True.

steps.title: Test the second inequality
steps.content:
For inequality II, compare $y$ with $x-4$.
$$-3\gt 3-4$$
$$-3\gt -1$$
False.

steps.title: Identify what is satisfied
steps.content: Point $P$ satisfies inequality I only. The answer is A.
